title: Senior Financial Analyst - 5paisa International Enterprises - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - 5paisa International Enterprises - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with 5paisa International Enterprises! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About 5paisa International Enterprises:
5paisa International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 5paisa International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
